ham.subject: Out of Office: [Your Name]
ham.body:
Hello,

I am currently out of the office on vacation from March 20th to March 27th and will have limited access to email.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Jane Doe at jane.doe@example.com.

I will respond to your email upon my return. Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Join the Executive Briefing via Zoom
spam.body:
Dear [Recipient],

The Board has scheduled a mandatory executive briefing on March 15th, 2024 at 10:00 AM UTC. This meeting is critical for compliance and strategic alignment.

Please join the meeting via the secure link below:
<URL>

Failure to attend may result in disciplinary action. Confirm your attendance by replying to this email with "CONFIRMED".

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Board Compliance Team
